_comment: FROZEN CONTRACT — the exact shape GET /v1/models returns to the 3D Avatar Chatbot and OpenAI SDK clients. Built-in personalities are listed as personality:<id>; personas are listed as persona:<alias>--<short8> ONLY when shared_api.enabled is true. Field names, the 'object' discriminators, and owned_by values must not change. See docs/design/ollabridge-cloud-mirror/ Phase 0.
